steps.t: Bori is by the upper crypts in the Pit of Stonejaws.
Bori needs your help to clear the rubble and debris away from the entrance to the south-west.
Bori needs your help to clear the rubble and debris away from the entrance.
Bori needs your help to clear the rubble and debris away from the entrance.
Together, you and Bori have cleared the rubble away from the room to the south-west, and can now gain entrance.
A broken mosaic decorates one wall of this chamber.
Bósi is outside the fortress of Shakhajât in the centre of the Pit of Stonejaws.
Bósi is outside Shakhajât in the centre of the Pit of Stonejaws.
